exemplar.title: How might the context in which knowledge is presented influence whether it is accepted or rejected?

detailedExemplarData.title: How might the context in which knowledge is presented influence whether it is accepted or rejected?

strengths: Clearly identifies three specific real-world objects with concrete social and historical contexts
Consistently links each object back to the IA prompt, showing how medium, audience and cultural values shape acceptance of knowledge claims
Provides strong justification for the inclusion of each object, supported by relevant details and direct evidence
Demonstrates an explicit, reasoned engagement beyond description, with quotations and comparative analysis for object 3
weaknesses: A few assertions (e.g., comment-section reactions, southern readership figures) lack precise referencing or data support
Analysis occasionally shifts into narrative description rather than analytical precision
Minor inconsistencies in citation formatting and occasional need for additional metrics (dates, view counts, statistics) to strengthen context
Some opportunities to deepen critical engagement (paraphrase headlines, integrate more audience studies) remain
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition meets the descriptors of the 9â10 band by clearly identifying three distinctive objects and situating them in real-world contexts. Each object is explicitly tied back to the IA prompt, and the commentary shows strong justification supported by relevant evidence (e.g., quotes from the Chicago Tribune review, details of celebrity influence on Ozempic uptake). While the analysis is robust and well-structured, minor sourcing gaps (lack of specific statistics, some narrative passages) prevent it from reaching a perfect 10. Assigning a 9 reflects the very high quality of the work while accounting for these small areas for improvement.

annotations.comment: The identification of Object 1 is clear, but specifying the exact YouTube video title, date and viewership figures would enhance the concrete context and deepen the link to the IA prompt.

This paragraph introduces the performance project but lacks a direct link back to how context influences acceptance of knowledge. Explicitly reference audience reactions against the satirical tone to tie back to the IA prompt.
The assertion about comment-section focus on comedy is insightful but would benefit from a specific example or direct quote from a comment to support the analysis.
The inclusion of the YouTube screenshot is relevant, but adding a caption with view counts, upload date and a brief description would clarify its real-world context.
The raw headline from People magazine identifies Object 2, but it would be valuable to paraphrase or comment on the framing to demonstrate critical engagement.
The section header effectively segments Object 1, but you might integrate a brief introduction to the chosen IA prompt here to maintain focus throughout.
When discussing stereotypes like âthe angry Black Man,â providing a specific statistic or study on audience perception would strengthen the justification for this objectâs inclusion.
The analysis of the âHennessey Youngmanâ persona is lucid. This clearly shows how medium and presentation impact acceptance of knowledge claims.
The âObject 3â header concisely marks the transition but consider previewing the objectâs source or date in the header for clarity.
Including the full primary source review is excellent. To deepen analysis, directly tie specific phrases (e.g., ârare excellenceâ) to the IA prompt regarding audience values.
The summary of the novelâs themes is concise. Strengthen by explicitly analysing how Southern audience values at publication shaped initial acceptance or rejection.
Good linkage of the review to the IA prompt here, noting North vs South reception. To solidify, cite readership data or contemporary accounts of audience response.
The Chicago Tribune quote is appropriate; including the date of the review in the text would reinforce the temporal context analysis.
The contrast between Northern and Southern receptions is insightful. To deepen the argument, reference a specific Southern reader account or sales figure.
The bibliographic entries demonstrate good practice. Ensure consistent formatting (e.g., date accessed, author names) to meet IB citation standards.
The URL for Object 3âs source appears generic. Verify the link directs to the original Chicago Tribune review for authenticity.
Overall, the exhibition presents three well-contextualized objects with clear links to the IA prompt. Continue enriching with direct quotes, dates, and metrics to achieve full analytical precision.
The side-by-side images for Object 2 are engaging. Consider adding viewership or readership metrics to demonstrate their real-world impact.
The connection between celebrity endorsement and adolescent uptake of Ozempic is convincing. You could deepen this by citing a study on influencer effects on health behaviour.
The description of Ozempicâs risks is clear. Strengthen the link to the IA prompt by explaining how public perception of risk shapes acceptance of drug knowledge.
The opening identification of People Magazine contextualizes Object 2 well, demonstrating its tabloid nature and social reach.
The review excerpt is well chosen. Consider referencing the specific publication date to show temporal context influencing reception.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
